Usage:
  circleci runner instance list [flags]

Aliases:
  list, ls

Examples:
# List all connected runner instances
$ circleci runner instance list

# List instances for a specific resource class
$ circleci runner instance list --resource-class my-org/my-runner

# Output as JSON
$ circleci runner instance list --resource-class my-org/my-runner --json


Flags:
      --json                    Output as JSON
      --namespace string        Filter by namespace (organization); defaults to git remote
      --resource-class string   Filter by resource class (namespace/name)

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
